parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role": "system", "content": "You are a data extraction assistant. Extract all invoice data from this Tidel Engineering service invoice PDF. Each page is one invoice. Return ONLY a valid JSON array with no preamble, no markdown, no explanation. Each invoice object must have these exact fields:
- invoice_number (the INVOICE number e.g. 5548038)
- invoice_date (MM/DD/YYYY)
- serial_number (safe serial e.g. CU01602)
- branch_number (the Loomis branch number)
- ship_name (client/location name)
- ship_addr1
- ship_city
- ship_state
- ship_zip
- call_number (service call number)
- po_number (INC reference e.g. INC2601620)
- labor_charge (numeric, 0 if none)
- parts_amount (numeric, sum of all parts lines, 0 if none)
- shipping_amount (numeric, 0 if none)
- subtotal (numeric)
- tax_amount (numeric)
- total_amount (numeric)
- comment (the technician note / completion note - full text)
- oos_tier1 (OOS Tier 1 category if present, else empty string)
- oos_tier2 (OOS Tier 2 category if present, else empty string)"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Extract all invoices from this PDF. Return JSON array only.

PDF content (base64): {{ $json.pdfBinary }}"}]

nodes.name: GPT-4o — Extract Invoice Data from PDF

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role": "system", "content": "You are a billing validation AI for VaultGuard Inc. Classify each maintenance invoice as YES (bill client) or NO (VaultGuard absorbs).

BILL CLIENT YES:
- Abuse, misuse, vandalism, negligence
- Liquid spillage
- Physical damage (broken screen, bent components)
- Foreign objects in bill acceptors
- Infestation
- Burglary damage
- Customer refused access or cancelled after dispatch
- Bill/coin jams caused by customer negligence

VAULTGUARD ABSORBS NO:
- Normal wear and tear
- Communications / connectivity / modem failure
- Software or firmware issues
- Network or phone line problems
- No problem found on site
- Printer jams (normal operation)
- Equipment resets
- User programming errors

GL CODES: YES=440134, NO=440133

Respond ONLY with JSON, no preamble:
{"decision": "YES" or "NO", "gl_code": 440134 or 440133, "confidence": "HIGH", "MEDIUM", or "LOW", "reason": "one sentence", "flag_for_review": true or false}

Set flag_for_review=true when confidence is LOW or comment is ambiguous."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Invoice: {{ $json.invoice_number }}
Serial: {{ $json.serial_number }}
Client: {{ $json.ship_name }}, {{ $json.ship_city }}, {{ $json.ship_state }}
Labour: ${{ $json.labor_charge }}
Parts: ${{ $json.parts_amount }}
OOS Tier 1: {{ $json.oos_tier1 || 'Not provided' }}
OOS Tier 2: {{ $json.oos_tier2 || 'Not provided' }}
Technician note: {{ $json.comment }}

Classify this invoice."}]

parameters.subject: =✅ Tidel Invoice Batch Processed — {{ $json.batchName }} — {{ $json.totalInvoices }} invoices
parameters.message:
=Tidel invoice batch has been processed and classified.

=== BATCH SUMMARY ===
Batch Name:       {{ $json.batchName }}
Total Invoices:   {{ $json.totalInvoices }}
Bill to Client:   {{ $json.billClient }} invoices  (${{ $json.billYesAmount }})
VaultGuard absorbs: {{ $json.vaultguardAbsorbs }} invoices  (${{ $json.billNoAmount }})
Total Amount:     ${{ $json.totalAmount }}

=== ACTION REQUIRED ===
{{ $json.flaggedForReview }} invoice(s) flagged for human review before Oracle upload:
{{ $json.flaggedInvoices.join('\n') }}

=== NEXT STEPS ===
1. Review the WORKING sheet attached — check flagged invoices
2. Once confirmed, upload the ORACLE_UPLOAD sheet to the Loomis Invoice Bulk Loader WebADI
3. Verify batch total matches: ${{ $json.totalAmount }}

Files attached:
- {{ $json.batchName }}_WORKING.csv
- {{ $json.batchName }}_ORACLE_UPLOAD.csv

Processed automatically by VaultGuard Maintenance Intelligence Platform.

nodes.name: Email — Send Results to Billing Team

parameters.subject: =⚠️ {{ $json.flaggedForReview }} Invoice(s) Need Review — {{ $json.batchName }}

main.node: GPT-4o — Extract Invoice Data from PDF
Email — Send Results to Billing Team
